rulings.Case Title: RICKY WASH SR. et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 20, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANT LESLIE CONTROLS INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF'S ANSWER TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY 17 REFLECTS THAT PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO ESTABLISH THAT DECEDENT WAS EXPOSED TO DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT THAT CONTAINED ASBESTOS, EITHER AS ORIGINAL EQUIPMENT AND/OR AS A REPLACEMENT PART. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO EXHIBITS A THROUGH F ARE SUSTAINED. =(302/PJM/PB)
